arts.ttl: ‘It’s where I perform best’ - Ferran loving playing as striker for Barca
arts.sum: It’s a great return from the Shark and he says he’s happy to play up front for Barca this season. Ferran Torres says he’s playing his best football as a striker after scoring in Barcelona’s 3-0 win over Osasuna in La Liga .

arts.ttl: Barcelona beats Osasuna 3-0 to extend La Liga lead
arts.sum: Frenkie de Jong played Balde clear before the left back found Torres for the striker’s 14th goal of the season across all competitions despite playing most games as a second-half substitute for Lewandowski. Ferran Torres and Dani Olmo scored early goals to lead Barcelona to a 3-0 win over Osasuna and extend its lead of the Spanish league on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Barcelona 3-0 Osasuna: Blaugrana ease to eighth straight win to move clear in La Liga title race
arts.sum: Barcelona cruise to victory in their game in hand to send a message in La Liga title race

arts.ttl: Barcelona injury, suspension news vs. Girona: Pau Cubarsi, Dani Olmo latest ahead of La Liga contest
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at Barcelona's injury and suspension news ahead of their La Liga clash with Girona.

arts.ttl: Barcelona 3-0 Osasuna: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Catalan giants strengthen grip on first spot in La Liga table
arts.sum: Barcelona move three points clear at the top of the La Liga table courtesy of a 3-0 home success over Osasuna on Thursday evening.

arts.ttl: Barcelona 3-0 Osasuna: Player Ratings as Catalans Return From Break With a Bang
arts.sum: Barcelona defeated Osasuna in their first game back from the March international break hoping for positive news on Dani Olmo who was substituted with an injury.

arts.ttl: Olmo forced off against Osasuna as Barca star picks up fresh injury
arts.sum: Barcelona star Dani Olmo has been hit with yet another injury setback after being forced off during Thursday’s La Liga clash with Osasuna . Olmo has had injury issues throughout his first season back at Barcelona and now appears to be facing more time on the sidelines.

arts.ttl: WATCH: Barcelona double their lead against Osasuna as Dani Olmo scores
arts.sum: Barcelona are well on course to record another La Liga victory after doubling their lead over Osasuna in their rearranged fixture at the Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys. It took only 11 minutes for Barcelona to break the deadlock against Osasuna, and it has come from Ferran Torres. arts.ttl: WATCH: Barcelona take early lead against Osasuna as Ferran Torres strikes
arts.sum: Barcelona can move three points clear at the top of La Liga with victory over Osasuna, and they are on course to achieve this after scoring an early goal in their clash at the Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys. arts.ttl: Flick reveals why he called up Araujo and offers Raphinha update
arts.sum: Flick had previously said that Araujo and Raphinha were out of the squad for the match due to their international commitments. Barcelona boss Hansi Flick has revealed why he opted to call up Ronald Araujo to his squad for Thursday’s game against Osasuna.
